name: handmux
description: A mobile vibe-coding cockpit — built on tmux: drive your live session, Claude Code / Codex — anything a terminal can run — from your phone.
author: yuanyuanzijin

whatsNew.zh: HTTPS 本机预览修复 · 通知链接安全加固
whatsNew.en: HTTPS localhost previews fixed · safer notification links

whatsNew.zh: 三修官方一键安装的 Claude 识别,真机已验证
whatsNew.en: Third fix for native-install Claude detection, device-verified

whatsNew.zh: 对话视图(实验性)· 通知记录 · 本机地址一键预览
whatsNew.en: Chat view (experimental) · notification inbox · one-tap localhost preview

whatsNew.zh: 分屏布局地图 · 手机也能建/删窗格
whatsNew.en: Split-layout map · create & close panes from the phone

whatsNew.zh: 键盘弹起终端自适应 · 全屏程序可上下滚动
whatsNew.en: Keyboard-aware terminal · scroll inside full-screen apps

whatsNew.zh: 终端文字选中拷贝 · 脚本复用推送通道
whatsNew.en: Terminal select & copy · scripts reuse the push channel

whatsNew.zh: 终端文件路径高亮可点
接管会话可自定义名称 + Homebrew 一键安装
whatsNew.en: Name a takeover session · Homebrew install
